# Spec context: §11.4 — Formatting directives

## Source

- Upstream: <https://abcnotation.com/wiki/abc:standard:v2.1#formatting_directives>
- Cached at: `crates/kaijutsu-abc/docs/abc-spec-cache.md` (line 2704)
- Section: 11. Stylesheet directives and pseudo-comments
- Subsection: 11.4 Formatting directives

Reproduced verbatim from the ABC v2.1 standard by Chris Walshaw,
under CC BY-NC-SA 3.0 — see `tests/fixtures/spec/README.md`.

## Preceding prose

> *Comment:* The `%%writefields` directive can be used in place of a number of directives introduced in abc 2.0:
> * "`%%writefields X`" can be used as an alternative to "`%%withxrefs`"
> * "`%%writefields Ww false`" can be used as an alternative to"`%%musiconly`"
> * "`%%writefields`" is a partial alternative to "`%%writehistory`" and "`%%infoname`"
> See [further information about directives](#further_information_about_directives "abc:standard:v2.1 ↵") for more details of the 2.0 alternatives.
> *VOLATILE:* See the [section 11 disclaimer](#disclaimer "abc:standard:v2.1 ↵").
